summary.text: Customers find this cellular phone to be in great condition with battery health at 90% and holds a charge well. They describe it as a really good phone that appears like new. However, customers are disappointed that it has no sim card slot. Opinions are mixed regarding the screen quality and reliability, with some finding it okay while others have concerns.

authors_reviews.title: worth it for the price
authors_reviews.text: i was a little worried about buying a refurbished iphone from amazon given some of the sellers reviews but my phone came in great condition. there are some very minor scratches but theyre barely noticable and everything else is in working condition. the battery capacity was 100% with 190 charge cycles on it. came with a glass screen protector on which was nice. it does not come in the apple iphone box but rather a box from the reseller with an off brand usb-A to usb-c cord, but the phone was about $400 cheaper than its market price so it doesn’t even matter
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Almost Like New — Great Deal for the Price!
authors_reviews.text: I bought the renewed iPhone 15 Pro in Black Titanium, and it honestly surprised me in a good way. The phone looks brand new — no scratches or marks anywhere. Battery health was 91%, which is totally fine for a renewed device, and it still lasts me easily all day with normal use.Performance-wise, it’s flawless. The A17 Pro chip is insanely fast — everything from editing photos to gaming runs super smooth. The titanium frame feels lighter and more premium than older models, and the screen is absolutely stunning with that 120Hz refresh rate.The camera is amazing, especially the telephoto and night shots — colors are realistic and detailed. The new USB-C port also makes charging and transferring files much easier.If you’re thinking about getting a renewed one, I’d say go for it. You get a top-tier iPhone that feels new, performs perfectly, and saves you a good amount of money. Totally worth it.
authors_reviews.author: Pouya

authors_reviews.title: Bit of a Gamble
authors_reviews.text: *UPDATE*Within a couple of weeks, hairline cracks started appearing on the screen, without being dropped or any other abnormal contact. Cleary the screen was damaged before it was sent and/or the original was replaced with one of lower quality. Had to get another new phone, go through the whole transfer process again, and will now be returning this one. Not worth the hassleOriginal review:Received my phone today. Not bad, battery is 94%, says its been charged 279 cycles, a bit higher than I expected.My main issue is that the condition was listed as "excellent" on the amazon page when i bought it, but there's small scratches right in the prime real estate of the screen. I'm sure I'll get used to them, but pretty unacceptable for 'excellent' condition.I also can't review my exact order, when I try it just takes me to the page for whatever they have currently listed, which are models with different prices and conditions. I also don't recall the listing saying the phone was eSim, but since i can't review the full details I might have just missed it.It's still an OK deal, but be prepared for things to not be exactly as listed, or over-promised. But I guess that's the risk you take with these types of things. Oh and take a screenshot of the listing right before you order it, so you know exactly what was ordered.
authors_reviews.author: Brendan Y.

authors_reviews.title: Clean, Smooth, and Like New dual chip iPhone 15 Pro
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been using this refurbished iPhone 15 Pro for two days now, and so far, the experience has been excellent.• Condition: It arrived in a plain white box,well wrapped but the phone itself is in great condition. It looks like new with no visible marks or scratches.• Performance: Everything is working great. It’s fast, responsive, and I haven't run into any issues with the software or hardware.• Battery Life: The health is at 88% with a 519 ciclo count. While it’s clearly been used before, the battery is holding up well for my daily tasks so far.Final Thoughts: It’s still early days, but for a refurbished device, it feels like a solid win.
authors_reviews.author: Anahy ✨🌻

authors_reviews.title: Pleased and Relieved
authors_reviews.text: Very pleased with this phone, it’s a relief to receive what you order. Only a slight divot on the screen and some scratches on the body. Even more than a year later I’m still pleased with this phone.
authors_reviews.author: rhea

authors_reviews.title: Perfect condition
authors_reviews.text: Came in early and practically perfect condition. Decent battery health. Very happy with it.
authors_reviews.author: Reet Boi

authors_reviews.title: Bought dual sim, received ESIM only
authors_reviews.text: I went with this company because they had the dual sim version (which I purchased) but I received ESIM only. 87% battery capacity at 737 cycles. Small dents on edges of frame but not very noticeable. Screen and rear camera glass is great.
authors_reviews.author: Matt
